title: Imperative + pronouns
grammar_notes: Affirmative commands: pronouns ATTACH to the end. 'Dame el libro.' / 'Dámelo.'
Negative commands: pronouns go BEFORE the verb. 'No me lo des.'
Adding a pronoun usually requires a written accent to preserve the original stress: 'dame' (no accent) → 'dámelo' (accent on dá).
Reflexive verbs follow the same rule: 'siéntate' (sit), 'no te sientes' (don't sit).
example_phrases: Cómprame el pan. — No me lo compres.
Levántate, por favor. — No te levantes.
